userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: User profile with avatar, broker API key references, role, registration details, and enrolled biometrics configuration statuses.

name.description: Full name or alias of the operator

avatar.description: Avatar tailwind color design scheme identifier class

brokerApiKey.description: Enrypted or masked linked exchange broker api key

brokerApiSecret.description: Enrypted or masked linked exchange broker api secret

role.description: Active authority role title of the operator within the Aegis system

touchIdEnrolled.description: Whether device Touch ID biometric key is enrolled and enabled for the user

faceIdEnrolled.description: Whether device Face ID biometric neural grid is enrolled and enabled for the user

securityLog.title: SecurityLog
securityLog.description: Audit trails logging system access, biometric overrides, API actions, and security status signals.

event.description: Detailed explanation of the logged event payload

ip.description: IP tracker address recording security action context

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 temporal mark for the incident

pastTrade.title: PastTrade
pastTrade.description: Archive recording historical active/closed trade contracts and verified execution yields.

id.description: Unique transaction identity within trading register

size.description: Absolute contracts size or units volume

entryPrice.description: Initial target purchase contract price value

exitPrice.description: Target settlement realization contract price value

pnl.description: Realized net dollar performance yield structure

strategy.description: Linked execution model blueprint strategy name

timestamp.description: Start date for matching position entry action

tradeMemory.title: TradeMemory
tradeMemory.description: Chronicles recording experiential model parameters compiled by Copilot intelligence networks.

id.description: Crypto signature of the memory structure

strategy.description: Strategy utilized in extraction feedback loops

type.description: Realized signal outcome bucket classification state

details.description: Text body detailing key machine learning observations

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles with security, roles, bio key enrollments and api coordinates.

users/{userId}/securityLogs/{logId}.description: Log of security audits and biometrics status indicators related to the registered profile.

users/{userId}/trades/{tradeId}.description: Past historical records on completed market contracts associated with the profile.

users/{userId}/memories/{memoryId}.description: Insights and learnings built by the Copilot backend system relating to the user.
